case_title: CHARLES SCHOBER VS. JOSEPH PEAY et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHOBER, CHARLES ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHOBER, CHARLES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PEAY, JOSEPH ZIMMERMAN, GRETCHEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT GRETCHEN ZIMMERMAN TO MAR-23-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. ALL NAMED PARTIES ARE PRESENT, DEFENDANT GRETCHEN ZIMMERMAN DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. PLAINTIFF ADVISED THAT THE COURT'S CONTINUAANCE ORDER IS NOT PROOF OF SERVICE AND DEFENDANT GRETCHEN ZIMMERMAN MUST BE SERVED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED MAR-08-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZIMMERMAN, GRETCHEN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SCHOBER, CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT PEAY, JOSEPH ZIMMERMAN, GRETCHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-14-2011 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY ALL NAMED PARTIES, DEFENDANT GRETCHEN ZIMMERMAN DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-23-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-23-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
